text: I THINK THEY ARE MORE FOCUSED ON GOV. BY THE PEOPLE/AO/NO
Sometimes I feel they go overboard with the unions, they'll do anything to get the labor vote and I don't agree with that.

The things that they stand for. I think they try to help people who need help. They are more for the people. I think they feel they should start at the bottom and work way up whereas Republicans start at the top to big businesses and hope it will trickle down.
I think they try to help big business too much.
Sometimes I think they have a little more class than the Democratic Party.
